Title: Windows audit policy must be configured and reviewed
Check Text: Review Windows audit policy settings in Local Security Policy and export applied GPO evidence.
Fix Text: Configure Windows audit policy through GPO and document the applied baseline.
References: VulnDiscussion: Audit policy gaps reduce investigation quality and may require updated evidence exports.; https://example.invalid/audit-r2 | Audit policy reference R2
Tags: Audit Logging; Endpoint Security; Windows; GPO

Title: Linux SSH banner must be configured
Check Text: Run sshd -T and review the banner setting and file permissions.
Fix Text: Configure the sshd Banner directive in /etc/ssh/sshd_config.

Title: Firewall management access must be restricted
Check Text: Review firewall management network restrictions and approved admin source ranges.
Fix Text: Restrict firewall management access to approved networks.
